svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="u032c_FyR8BOI21Ba75A" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-579" dy="-242" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="System Diagram: Real-Time Financial Intelligence Platform" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="760" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#555555;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="CQRS split: write path (insight generation) vs read path (serving cached insights). Region ap-south-1." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="900" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cognito" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#D79B00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Cognito User Pools
AUTH (JWT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="380" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ui" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Next.js UI (SSR)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apigw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="API Gateway (REST)
+ WAF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="380" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="watchlist" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=12;" value="Watchlist Lambda" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="660" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ddb" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="DynamoDB
(single table)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="900" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontSize=12;" value="WebSocket API Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="40" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="readcache" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="DynamoDB + S3
(hot) (cold lake)
read-only cache reads" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="170" x="900" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eventbridge" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=11;" value="EventBridge (schedule)
dev 5m / prod cron market hours" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="40" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="statemachine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Ingestion State Machine
Distributed Map over distinct
watchlist tickers (maxConcurrency 5)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="360" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fetchstore" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=11;" value="Fetch + Store (per ticker)
Yahoo / Alpha Vantage failover" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="360" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hotdata" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="DynamoDB hot returns
+ S3 data lake" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="700" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="anomaly" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=12;" value="Anomaly scan (z-score)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="360" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="correlation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=12;" value="Correlation grouping" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="700" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bedrock" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFD6E7;strokeColor=#CC6699;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Bedrock Insight
(cross-region profile)
structured JSON + rule-based fallback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="700" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storeinsight" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=12;" value="Store insight" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="360" y="765" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="crosscut" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#F8F8F8;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=12;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Cross-cutting: CloudWatch (structured logs, dashboards) - X-Ray (tracing) - SNS (ops alerts) - KMS (encryption) - Secrets Manager - WAF on API GW - AWS Budgets + Bedrock spend circuit breaker" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1030" x="40" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cognito_apigw" edge="1" parent="1" source="cognito" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#D79B00;fontSize=10;" target="apigw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_cognito" connectable="0" parent="e_cognito_apigw" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontColor=#D79B00;" value="JWT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ui_apigw" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="apigw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_rest" connectable="0" parent="e_ui_apigw" style="edgeLabel;html=1;" value="REST" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_apigw_watchlist" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="watchlist"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_watchlist_ddb" edge="1" parent="1" source="watchlist" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="ddb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_apigw_sm" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="statemachine"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_ingest" connectable="0" parent="e_apigw_sm" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#555555;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" value="on-demand ingest
POST /ingest/{ticker}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_apigw_read" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="readcache"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_query" connectable="0" parent="e_apigw_read" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#555555;" value="query GET /insights,
/market/{ticker}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ws_ui" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ui"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_push" connectable="0" parent="e_ws_ui" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" value="push insights" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_eb_sm" edge="1" parent="1" source="eventbridge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="statemachine"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_sched" connectable="0" parent="e_eb_sm" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;" value="schedule" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sm_fetch" edge="1" parent="1" source="statemachine" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="fetchstore"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_map" connectable="0" parent="e_sm_fetch" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;" value="Distributed Map" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fetch_hot" edge="1" parent="1" source="fetchstore" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="hotdata"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fetch_anomaly" edge="1" parent="1" source="fetchstore" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="anomaly"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_writepath" connectable="0" parent="e_fetch_anomaly" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#555555;" value="write path (decoupled)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_anomaly_corr" edge="1" parent="1" source="anomaly" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="correlation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_anomaly" connectable="0" parent="e_anomaly_corr" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;" value="anomaly?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_corr_bedrock" edge="1" parent="1" source="correlation" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="bedrock"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_bedrock_store" edge="1" parent="1" source="bedrock" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="storeinsight"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_store" connectable="0" parent="e_bedrock_store" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;" value="store insight" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_store_ws" edge="1" parent="1" source="storeinsight" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ws"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="300" y="795" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="325" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l_wspush" connectable="0" parent="e_store_ws" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#555555;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" value="WebSocket push
to affected users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.6" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
